name: QuickBooks
description: Accounting, invoices, customers, and financial operations via the QuickBooks Online MCP server.
notes: Official Intuit QuickBooks Online MCP server runs locally over stdio after a one-time OAuth handshake.
installHint: Runs via npx from the official GitHub repo. Complete the one-time OAuth handshake first (see github.com/intuit/quickbooks-online-mcp-server): clone, npm install, npm run build, npm run auth, then the server runs over stdio.
